title: LIMIT does not work with nested views containing UNION ALL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a INT, b VARCHAR(255), c FLOAT, d BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(1, 'test', 3.14, NULL), (2, 'example', 2.71, TRUE), (3, 'sample', NULL, FALSE);
CREATE VIEW v3 AS SELECT a, CONCAT(b, ' updated') AS b_updated FROM t2 WHERE c IS NOT NULL;
CREATE VIEW v5 AS SELECT * FROM v3 UNION ALL SELECT a, 'fallback' FROM t2 WHERE d = FALSE;
key_bug_features: LIMIT fails in nested views with UNION ALL
